'''Hran Beling''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Vicon]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiate]] studying in the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temples]] [[Jedi academy|academy]] during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Vicon]], the diminutive Hran Beling received [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] Beling was studying at the Temple in [[89 BBY]] when the [[Dark Holocron]] was stolen from the [[Jedi Archives/Legends|Temple Archives]], and Beling conveyed this news to one of his contemporaries at the Temple, [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], speculating that there could have been an intruder within the complex. Several days later, Initiate Beling participated in an [[Jedi academy|academy]] competition which took students out of the Temple and into the [[Senate District/Legends|Senate District]]. Competing with Initiate Dooku in a challenge against another team of Jedi trainees to secure a piece of [[Muja fruit/Legends|muja fruit]] from a market, Beling was stunned unconscious by the other team and unable to complete the challenge.<ref name="LotJ" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Jedi]]'' {{1st}}
